_comment: Selective per-tool policy, informed by the spike's measured per-tool savings (gh records +16-30%, runecho +25-29%, kb +2.6%, single objects +0%). First matching rule wins; unmatched tools use defaults. tiers subset of [minify, tabularize, dictionary]; [] = passthrough. v1 is 100% lossless: lossy field modes are parsed but not executed (warned).

policies._comment: Verbose record/symbol APIs — full Tier-0/0.5 pays (16-30%).
Already field-projected + high-cardinality content; dictionary added ~nothing (+2.6% total). Keep cheap structural tiers, drop dictionary.
Status/single-object endpoints measured +0% — skip entirely to avoid transform cost.
